arts.ttl: PLAYER RATINGS | Nantes 1-1 PSG: subpar Parisiens maintain their Ligue 1 invincibility
arts.sum: McDonald’s Ligue 1, Round 29, 22/04/25 Paris Saint-Germain were far from their free-flowing best as they had to settle for just a point against FC Nantes (1-1). It is a…

arts.ttl: PSG drop points in 1-1 draw with relegation-threatened Nantes
arts.sum: Vitinha's opener for PSG was cancelled out by Douglas Costa's late strike, securing a crucial point for Nantes. Paris' unbeaten away run was halted at 38 games.
